title: Driver Teams — Schema Migration
tech: Node.js, TypeScript, Express, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Zod
keyConstraints: TypeScript strict, Prisma 6 (pinned — do not upgrade), no raw SQL, run npx prisma generate after schema changes
description: Add assignedTeamId to Job model so jobs can be assigned to a team. Wire the foreign key to the existing Team model.
acceptanceCriteria: Job model has optional assignedTeamId String? field with @relation to Team
Team model has a jobs Job[] relation back-reference
Migration created and applied with npx prisma migrate dev --name add-job-team-assignment
npx prisma generate runs clean after migration
npx tsc --noEmit passes with no errors
All existing Prisma select objects in jobs.ts include assignedTeamId so the field is returned in API responses
implementationNotes: Add to Job model: assignedTeamId String? and relation field team Team? @relation(fields: [assignedTeamId], references: [id])
Add jobs Job[] back-reference to Team model
Add assignedTeamId to every Prisma select object in jobs.ts that returns job data — same pattern as other fields
